options.content: **gRPC Requests and Request Latencies** — this section focuses on gRPC metrics, these metrics are really useful for troubleshooting issues such as workflow task timeouts, reaching limits on throttling etc. General troubleshooting info can be found here: https://github.com/tsurdilo/temporal-server-operations/blob/main/metrics/SDK_METRICS_REQUEST_FAILURES.md

panels.title: Requests
panels.description: Rate of gRPC requests sent by the SDK broken down by operation and status code.

panels.title: Long-Poll Requests
panels.description: Rate of long-poll gRPC requests (Poll* calls) sent by the SDK broken down by operation and status code.

panels.title: Request Failures
panels.description: Rate of failed gRPC requests broken down by operation and status code.

panels.title: Long-Poll Request Failures
panels.description: Rate of failed long-poll gRPC requests broken down by operation and status code.

panels.title: Request Latency
panels.description: Latency of short (non-poll) gRPC requests broken down by operation at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

panels.title: Long-Poll Request Latency
panels.description: Latency of long-poll gRPC requests broken down by operation at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

options.content: **Worker Lifecycle** — this section focuses on worker lifecycle metrics

panels.title: Worker Start
panels.description: Rate of worker start events broken down by worker type and task queue.

panels.title: Number of Active Pollers
panels.description: Current number of active pollers broken down by poller type and task queue.

panels.title: Worker Task Slots Available
panels.description: Number of execution slots currently available broken down by worker type and task queue.

panels.title: Worker Task Slots Used
panels.description: Number of execution slots currently in use broken down by worker type and task queue.

options.content: **Worker Cache** — this section focuses on Worker Sticky Cache info

panels.title: Sticky Cache Hit
panels.description: Rate of workflow tasks that found a matching cached execution.

panels.title: Sticky Cache Miss
panels.description: Rate of workflow tasks that found no cached execution, requiring a full replay.

panels.title: Sticky Cache Size
panels.description: Current number of cached workflow executions in the sticky cache.

panels.title: Sticky Cache Forced Evictions
panels.description: Rate of workflow executions forcibly evicted from the sticky cache.

options.content: **Workflow Executions Info** — this section focuses on workflow execution completions and end to end latency of execution.

panels.title: Workflow End-to-End Latency
panels.description: Total time from schedule to close for a single workflow run broken down by workflow type and task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

options.content: **Schedule To Start Latencies** — this section focuses on schedule to start latencies for workflow and activity tasks

panels.title: Workflow Task Schedule To Start Latency
panels.description: Time from workflow task scheduled on server to worker picking it up, broken down by task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

panels.title: Activity Schedule To Start Latency
panels.description: Time from activity task scheduled on server to worker picking it up, broken down by activity type and task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

options.content: **Workflow Task Info** — this section focuses on Workflow Task Information

panels.title: Workflow Task Poll Empty
panels.description: Rate of polls that completed with no task returned (long-poll timeout), broken down by workflow type and task queue.

panels.title: Workflow Task Poll Succeed
panels.description: Rate of polls that returned a workflow task, broken down by workflow type and task queue.

panels.title: Workflow Task Execution Latency
panels.description: Time to execute a single workflow task broken down by workflow type and task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

panels.title: Workflow Task Replay Latency
panels.description: Time spent replaying history during a workflow task broken down by workflow type and task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

panels.title: Workflow Task Execution Failed
panels.description: Rate of workflow task execution failures broken down by workflow type, task queue, and failure reason.

options.content: **Activity Task Info** — this section focuses on information about Activity Tasks

panels.title: Activity Poll No Task
panels.description: Rate of activity polls that completed with no task returned, broken down by activity type and task queue.

panels.title: Activity Task Received
panels.description: Rate of activity tasks received and dispatched to the language layer, broken down by activity type and task queue.

panels.title: Activity Execution Failed
panels.description: Rate of activity task execution failures broken down by activity type and task queue.

panels.title: Activity Execution Latency
panels.description: Time from when Core dispatched the task to lang completing it, broken down by activity type and task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

panels.title: Activity Succeed End-to-End Latency
panels.description: Total time from first schedule to successful completion across all retries, broken down by activity type and task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

options.content: **Local Activity Info** — this section focuses on Local Activities information

panels.title: Local Activity Execution Failed
panels.description: Rate of local activity execution failures broken down by activity type and task queue.

panels.title: Local Activity Execution Cancelled
panels.description: Rate of local activity execution cancellations broken down by activity type and task queue.

panels.title: Local Activity Total
panels.description: Total count of local activity executions attempted, broken down by activity type and task queue.

panels.title: Local Activity Execution Latency
panels.description: Time to execute a single local activity attempt broken down by activity type and task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

panels.title: Local Activity Succeed End-to-End Latency
panels.description: Total time from schedule to successful completion broken down by activity type and task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

options.content: **Nexus Tasks Info** — this section focuses on Nexus Tasks information

panels.title: Nexus Poll No Task
panels.description: Rate of Nexus task polls that returned empty, broken down by task queue.

panels.title: Nexus Task Execution Failed
panels.description: Rate of Nexus task execution failures broken down by task queue and failure reason.

panels.title: Nexus Schedule To Start Latency
panels.description: Time from Nexus task scheduled to worker picking it up, broken down by task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

panels.title: Nexus Task Execution Latency
panels.description: Time to execute a Nexus task broken down by task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

panels.title: Nexus Task End-to-End Latency
panels.description: Total end-to-end time for a Nexus task broken down by task queue at the selected percentile. Reported in milliseconds.

title: Temporal Core SDK Dashboard (TypeScript, Python, .NET, Ruby) v1.3.0
